dossier.bio: Ms. Lin Chen, founder and chief executive of a Hong Kong–based fintech, arriving on the Valley leg of a Pacific itinerary.
dossier.identityConfidence: Low on open web. Public-web search did not surface a clean match for 'Lin Chen, Founder & CEO, Lattice Capital'; results returned an unrelated HKU finance professor and a separate 'Lattice' entity. All professional claims below draw from the CRM publicSignals block, not from independent press confirmation.

conversationHooks.hook: Series B announcement in April — congratulations are in order, lightly.
Her keynote at Hong Kong FinTech Week last autumn — staff may reference it only if she raises it.
conversationHooks.source: CRM publicSignals.recentEvents: 'Keynote at HK FinTech Week 2025'

handleWithCare: Ms. Chen declined alcohol throughout her Phuket stay. Offer still and sparkling water by default; no welcome glass of wine, no champagne turndown.
Audio preference is silence. No in-room music on arrival; minimise lobby-to-suite chatter on the walk up.
Two HK stays and one Phuket stay — she is a returning Rosewood guest, not a newcomer. Greet by name, not by script.

suppressed.reason: Recent personal/educational activity; feels like monitoring. Kept in itinerary (Cantor offer) where guest-optional; removed from conversation openers.

roomState.bedding: down-free pillows; duvet swapped from house default
reasoning: climateC 19°C — CRM preferences.roomTempC = 19; corroborated by Hong Kong Oct 2025 stay highlight 'Thermostat noted at 19°C'.
scent sandalwood — CRM preferences.scent = 'sandalwood'; Hong Kong Oct 2025 highlight 'Praised suite sandalwood scent'. Overrides Sand Hill default of 'cedar, low'.
bedding down-free — CRM preferences.pillows = 'down-free'; Hong Kong Feb 2026 highlight 'Requested down-free pillows'. Overrides Sand Hill default 'down'.
lighting ambient low — Sand Hill default 'ambient', dimmed to match the quiet register she praised in Phuket.

welcomeAmenity.name: Heirloom Bartlett pears + Bay Area honey
welcomeAmenity.story: 30 min from property — orchard fruit that grew up under the same coastal fog
welcomeAmenity.reasoning: Pescatarian-compatible and alcohol-free. The honey component echoes the Phuket lemongrass-infused honey tasting set she 'loved'; the orchard provenance gives Maria Salvo a natural opening should Ms. Chen wish to meet the source. A Sense of Place: Bay Area orchard, not generic luxury fruit.

itinerary.title: Sand Hill cycling loop with Bici provisions
itinerary.whyHere: The bike-and-coffee local ritual; the property's own café provisions the ride
itinerary.vendorOrPlace: Sand Hill Road loop · Bici Coffee at property
itinerary.reasoning: Phuket stay shows 6 AM beach walks every morning and a morning-ritual pattern (HK spa used twice as morning ritual). The Sand Hill equivalent of that dawn movement is the Bici-provisioned loop — quiet, self-paced, no companion required.

itinerary.title: Coupa Cafe coffee meeting
itinerary.reasoning: She is a fintech founder post–Series B; Coupa is the discreet venue for any follow-on meeting she chooses to take off-property. Offer; do not assume.

itinerary.title: Cantor Arts Center private view, Stanford
itinerary.whyHere: Rodin garden; Cantor's California modernism collection
itinerary.reasoning: In Hong Kong she asked about Wong Kar-wai film locations — a guest interested in place-bound visual culture. Daniel Sotomayor (Placemaker, Cantor curator) is the natural host; the Stanford architectural lineage extends the cultural register without repeating HK.

itinerary.title: Pescatarian tasting at The Sea
itinerary.whyHere: Echoes the register of Henry's at HK; quiet alcove available
itinerary.reasoning: Direct callback: she 'loved Henry's tasting menu' in HK. Pescatarian-aligned per CRM dietary; quiet alcove honours her audio-silence and 'praised the quiet' notes. Confirm an alcohol-free pairing in advance — Phuket precedent.

arrivalLogistics.flight: UA857 (United) — note: this segment is SFO→PVG departing, scheduled arrival PVG 2026-05-17 17:25 UTC, currently active with 27-minute delay. This appears to be an onward/outbound segment rather than her inbound to SFO; confirm inbound flight with the guest's office before despatching the car.
